=== RESPONSE 2: Act 2 ===

=== RESPONSE 3: Act 3 ===

=== RESPONSE 4: Act 4 ===
Yeah, that looks fine to me!

Hmm... I think it just makes sure the namespace has an underscore? Looks right to me.

Oh wait... if it's empty... that would crash! Right? Because it tries to check the underscore thing but there is no actual string there. I definitely missed that.

=== RESPONSE 5: Act 5 ===
Add better error handling?

OK, add input validation that raises TypeError if message isn't a string, and ValueError if it's empty.

Wow, that's a massive difference. I never would have thought the phrasing matters that much. I would have just said "make it safer" and assumed the AI knew what I meant.
